title: The Hollow Bishop
summary: A ritual-looking homicide in a locked church office.

evidence.title: Parish Ledger Extract
evidence.summary: A torn ledger page records an off-books transfer approved by Bishop Vale.

evidence.title: Vestry Scene Photo
evidence.summary: A still image captures the chalice beside the vestry desk after the disturbance.

evidence.title: Vestry Interview Transcript
evidence.summary: A groundskeeper describes the silver chalice found beside the victim's desk.

stages.title: Ledger Review
stages.summary: Break apart the staged ritual scene before filing an accusation.
handlerPrompts: Review the vestry ledger before deciding whether the chalice matters.
Bram's interview suggests someone wanted your attention off the books.

objectives.prompt: Was the silver chalice actually the murder weapon?

stages.title: Poison Proof
stages.summary: Use the scene photo to identify who staged the chalice and poisoned the wine.
handlerPrompts: The wax on the chalice and the spill pattern do not tell the same story.
Only one suspect had both the financial motive and access to the sacramental wine.

objectives.prompt: Who poisoned the sacramental wine to silence the bishop?
